items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Senior Product Marketing Manager to own the go-to-market strategy for our platform. You will be the expert on our buyers, competitive landscape, and market positioning, translating product capabilities into compelling narratives that resonate with technical and business audiences alike.

This role is central to our growth, sitting at the intersection of product, marketing, and sales. You will launch new features, arm the sales team with enablement materials, and shape how the market perceives our brand.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and refine product positioning, messaging, and value propositions
  • Lead go-to-market planning and execution for product launches and major feature releases
  • Create sales enablement materials including battle cards, pitch decks, and competitive analyses
  • Conduct market and competitive research to inform product and marketing strategy
  • Develop customer case studies and success stories that build credibility
  • Partner with demand generation to optimize campaign messaging and audience targeting

Requirements

  • 6+ years of product marketing experience in B2B SaaS
  • Proven track record of successful product launches and GTM campaigns
  • Strong storytelling skills with the ability to translate technical features into business value
  • Experience with competitive intelligence and analyst relations
  • Excellent project management skills and ability to work cross-functionally

Nice to Have

  • Experience marketing CMS, DXP, or developer-focused products
  • Background in content strategy or technical writing
  • Experience with product-led growth motions alongside sales-led GTM
